heading: Grant authorization
label: 10561 Grant authorization
text: The Attorney General shall award grants to States and units of local government in accordance with this subchapter.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3797j of Title 42
Amendments2002— inserted “and units of local government” after “States”.Pub. L. 107–273
amendments: Amendments2002— inserted “and units of local government” after “States”.Pub. L. 107–273
